title: ProfileStats

rowCount.description: Total number of rows scanned when computing this profile.

nullCount.description: Number of rows where this field is null.

distinctCount.description: Optional count of distinct non-null values.

topValues.description: List of the most frequent {value, count} pairs.

min.description: Minimum observed value (string or number depending on field type).

max.description: Maximum observed value (string or number depending on field type).

patterns.description: List of observed value patterns (e.g., regex skeletons for string fields).

description: A statistical summary of a field's data distribution, including row count, null count, distinct count, top-value frequencies, min/max values, and observed patterns.
